description: Set parameters for a static mechanical analysis that are specific to zones. The following keywords apply.

6.0.description: Sets parameters for a static mechanical analysis, that are specific to zones. The following keywords apply:

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Select the damping type for the static, mechanical process (the default damping is local).

keywords.name: damping-combined
keywords.description: combined local damping (default is 0.8).

keywords.name: damping-local
keywords.description: local damping (default is 0.8). If the alternate keyword is specified, an experimental alternate implementation of local damping is used that produces less sensitivity to small changes in the model.

keywords.name: energy
keywords.description: allows elastic strain energy and dissipated plastic energy to be calculated (see Energy Calculation in FLAC3D).

keywords.name: energy-active
keywords.description: Turns the calculations off/on in the stress-strain loop

7.0.description: Sets parameters for a static mechanical analysis, that are specific to zones. The following keywords apply:

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Select the damping type for the static, mechanical process (the default damping is local).

keywords.name: damping-combined
keywords.description: combined local damping (default is 0.8).

keywords.name: damping-local
keywords.description: local damping (default is 0.8). If the alternate keyword is specified, an experimental alternate implementation of local damping is used that produces less sensitivity to small changes in the model.

keywords.name: energy
keywords.description: allows elastic strain energy and dissipated plastic energy to be calculated (see Energy Calculation in FLAC3D).

keywords.name: energy-active
keywords.description: Turns the calculations off/on in the stress-strain loop

keywords.name: list
keywords.description: shows a summary of current zone mechanical settings in the console.

keywords.name: active
keywords.description: Turn mechanical-module computations on or off. Active by default.

keywords.name: damping
keywords.description: Set the mechanical damping scheme for zones in the range. Sub-keywords: combined, local.

keywords.name: damping-combined
keywords.description: Apply combined damping with fraction f to zones in the range.

keywords.name: damping-local
keywords.description: Apply local damping with fraction f to zones in the range. The alternate keyword switches to an alternative mass-proportional formulation.

keywords.name: energy
keywords.description: Configure or reset the mechanical-energy accounting. Sub-keywords: active, clear.

keywords.name: energy-active
keywords.description: Turn the mechanical-energy accounting on or off. When on, FLAC3D accumulates kinetic, strain, boundary-work, and dissipated energies per zone and globally.

keywords.name: energy-clear
keywords.description: Reset the accumulated mechanical-energy counters to zero for zones in the range (or globally if no range supplied).

keywords.name: list
keywords.description: List current mechanical-module settings (active state, damping summary, energy state, safety factor).

keywords.name: safety-factor
keywords.description: Set the safety factor applied to the mechanical critical timestep. Smaller values give a more conservative (smaller) actual timestep.
